title: 2021 CSH CC001 GMU 13 Nelchina Caribou hunting season ended January 22, 2021
summary: 2021 CSH CC001 GMU 13 Nelchina Caribou hunting season ended January 22, 2021, report online at http://hunt.alaska.gov or call 907-822-3461 to report on phone or mail back permit to Alaska Department of Fish and Game.

title: United States cattle inventory down slightly
summary: There were 93.6 million head of cattle and calves on U.S. farms as of Jan. 1, 2021, according to the Cattle report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).
